name: Turkey Tail (Trametes versicolor)
summary: Turkey tail has moderate evidence in specific adjunct oncology contexts, especially PSK/PSP products used in regulated settings.
description: Medicinal mushroom containing PSK/PSP polysaccharides studied as adjunct immune therapy in some cancer contexts.
contraindications: clinical context and product standardization matter.
affiliate_query: Turkey Tail (Trametes versicolor) supplement standardized extract
buying_criteria: avoid proprietary blends and unsupported disease claims
